customer_message: My data export worked fine yesterday, but today it's incomplete. Some records are missing from the CSV. I've tried multiple times.
response_quality_hint: Intermittent data loss is serious, ask for specifics (how many records, which export), escalate

customer_message: I'm on a free plan and want to upgrade to premium. But I'm confused about the pricing. The website shows different prices in different places.
response_quality_hint: Sales/pricing issue, clarify pricing, potentially escalate to sales or billing

customer_message: When I use the app on my iPhone with a slow internet connection, it crashes. But it works fine on WiFi. This is frustrating.
response_quality_hint: Network-dependent crash, could be timeout handling or mobile optimization issue

customer_message: I requested access to the team collaboration feature 2 weeks ago. I still don't have it. Can you check what's happening?
response_quality_hint: Delayed access is bad for paying customer, check status, escalate if stuck in queue

customer_message: We're using your API to build an integration. Our tests pass locally but fail in production. Only happens with large datasets.
response_quality_hint: Production issue with customer integration, critical, escalate with request for details

customer_message: The billing system shows I'm a free user, but I clearly paid for premium 3 months ago. I've been using premium features without them being activated properly.
response_quality_hint: Billing sync issue affecting service, customer is upset, escalate to billing immediately

customer_message: I'm trying to transfer my data to another account, but the transfer keeps timing out. I've tried 5 times now.
response_quality_hint: Data transfer issue, could be size/timeout, ask for data size, escalate to engineering

customer_message: Your system says I haven't paid my invoice, but I have proof of payment from 2 months ago. Why is this happening?
response_quality_hint: Billing error causing service disruption, urgent, need to investigate payment sync

customer_message: The Android app crashes on startup for me, but my colleague has the same device and version, and it works fine for them. Super weird.
response_quality_hint: Device-specific crash, ask for detailed device info, app version, storage space, OS details

customer_message: We switched to your plan last month. Everything worked great until yesterday. Now half my team can't access certain documents.
response_quality_hint: Regression affecting new customer, high priority, escalate to investigate recent changes
